File Information
Collection: SSCentral - In-Game API
Environment: SSCENTRAL-LOCAL
Collection Description
## SSCentral – In-Game API This collection contains the full suite of test cases for the **SSCentral In-Game API** — the backend API used by the _**FiveSteps: Rhythm Game**_ client to interact with the _**SSCentral**_ platform. It covers player authentication, song discovery, voting, hash verification, song downloading, and community pack browsing. ### Folders | # | Folder | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | 00 | **Player Authentication** | Handles Firebase-based player login, providing the JWT token used to authenticate subsequent requests. | | 01 | **Song Discovery** | Tests the song discovery endpoint across a wide range of scenarios: default queries, filtering by ID, text search, pagination parameters, and edge cases such as unapproved songs or non-existent IDs. | | 02 | **Voting** | Covers the song voting system, including casting votes, handling duplicate votes, voting on unapproved or non-existent songs, and authentication enforcement. | | 03 | **Hash Verification** | Validates the chart/SSC hash verification endpoint, testing approved and unapproved hashes, hashes from unapproved packs, non-existent hashes, and authentication edge cases. | | 04 | **Song Download** | Tests song download endpoints, including valid downloads, unapproved content, non-existent songs, and authentication requirements. | | 05 | **HUB & Community Packs** | Tests endpoints related to browsing HUB-featured and community-submitted song packs, including approved and unapproved pack scenarios. | ### Environment All requests are designed to run against the `SSCENTRAL-LOCAL` environment, which provides variables such as `base_url`, `FIREBASE_API_KEY`, player credentials, and pre-seeded song/pack/hash IDs for consistent and repeatable test execution.
